root.sql: SELECT count(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no) as_count_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_control , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.region_group = sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code = '0' ) AND (sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_control <> '9000') /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_control , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
